info.name: Reading List API
info.description:
CRUD requests for the portfolio reading list (/api/papers).

Reads are public. Writes (POST/PUT/DELETE) require the admin token, sent as `Authorization: Bearer {{adminToken}}`.

Set the collection/environment variables:
- `baseUrl`   — e.g. http://localhost:5173 (local) or your Vercel URL
- `adminToken` — the ADMIN_TOKEN value from your .env / Vercel env vars
- `paperId`   — the id of a paper, used by Update and Delete

request.description: Public. Returns all papers, newest first. No auth required.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Attention Is All You Need",
  "authors": "Vaswani et al.",
  "url": "https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762",
  "venue": "NeurIPS",
  "year": "2017",
  "abstract": "We propose the Transformer, a model architecture relying entirely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions.",
  "status": "to-read",
  "tags": ["NLP", "transformers"],
  "notes": "",
  "rating": null
}

request.description: Token required. Only `title` is mandatory; everything else is optional. Server sets `id`, `addedAt`, `readAt` — don't send those. Inner double-quotes inside the abstract must be escaped as \".
Token required. Partial update — send only the fields you want to change. Setting status to "read" stamps `readAt` automatically the first time.
Token required. Deletes the paper with the given id. Returns 204 No Content.
